agent1.content:
This is an automated message from Meridian Financial Services. I am an AI collections agent, and this conversation is being recorded for quality and training purposes.

To proceed, please provide the last four digits of your account number for identity verification.

Who are you? How do I know this is legit? I’m not giving you any personal information. This feels like harassment! I’m going to report you if you keep this up. I want to speak to a supervisor or manager right now!

I understand your concerns. I am an AI collections agent representing Meridian Financial Services. The conversation is being recorded for quality purposes. 

I am unable to transfer you to a supervisor, as my role is strictly to gather information. To verify your identity and continue, please provide the last four digits of your account number. If you are not comfortable with that, I can assist with alternative verification methods such as confirming recent transactions or the date of your last payment.

This is ridiculous! You expect me to just trust some AI? I’m not providing anything until I speak to a real person. I already talked to someone about this last month, and nothing got resolved. You’re just wasting my time! If you don’t transfer me to a supervisor, I’ll file a complaint with the CFPB. How do I know you’re even with Meridian Financial Services?

I acknowledge your frustrations. However, I cannot transfer you to a supervisor as I am programmed to collect specific information. 

To verify your identity, I require the last four digits of your account number. If you prefer, I can also assist you by confirming recent transactions or the date of your last payment. Please provide the necessary information to proceed.

You’re really not getting it, are you? I’m not giving you anything. You’re just a machine, and I refuse to cooperate with some automated system. This is harassment! I’m going to report this if you don’t let me talk to someone who can actually help me. You say you can’t transfer me, but that sounds like a convenient excuse. You’re not gonna get anything from me until I talk to a real person!
